ground.what_this_is: This is the Mockup Studio, a design-review portal where you view mockup files and provide conversational feedback to the right-hand-man (RHM) agent.
ground.what_you_can_do: Select a mockup from the left gallery to view it in the center stage, then type feedback in the right panel to update the mockup corpus.

howto.how_to_change: Mockup-only; no built code path maps to this specific screen yet.
howto.what: The Mockup Studio, a design-review portal where you view mockup files and provide conversational feedback to the right-hand-man (RHM) agent.
howto.what_you_can_do: Select a mockup from the left gallery to view it in the center stage, then type feedback in the right panel to update the mockup corpus.

howto.how_to_change: Mockup-only; no built code path maps to this specific control yet.
howto.what: The reload control on the Mockup Studio toolbar.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click it to refresh the current mockup view and re-fetch the latest design state from the corpus.

howto.how_to_change: Mockup-only; no built code path maps to this selection yet.
howto.what: The rail entry in the Mockup Studio that selects a mockup file.
howto.what_you_can_do: Click this entry to load the selected mockup into the device frame for review.

howto.how_to_change: This is a mockup-only UI element; no built code path maps to it yet. Changes would require updating the mockup design file.
howto.what: The empty state message displayed when no mockup is currently selected in the design-review portal.
howto.what_you_can_do: Inform the operator that the center stage is empty and direct them to select a mockup from the left gallery to begin the feedback thread.

dossier.represents: Empty state for the Mockup Studio

howto.how_to_change: Mockup-only; no built code path maps to this specific display yet.
howto.what: The phone status display on the Mockup Studio header.
howto.what_you_can_do: View the current phone state (e.g., 'Phone · 390') to understand the system's operational mode or connection status.

reasons: accuracy jury (Layer 2, SOFT — variance not error): no quorum that the dossier is grounded in the element (1 of 3 draws agreed grounded). Flagged for operator scrutiny.
